faith_aggregate_breakouts_count_or_suppr.name: faith_aggregate_breakouts_count_or_suppressed
faith_aggregate_breakouts_count_or_suppr.value: (count IS NOT NULL AND suppressed = false) OR (count IS NULL AND suppressed = true)

faith_aggregate_metrics_value_or_suppres.name: faith_aggregate_metrics_value_or_suppressed
faith_aggregate_metrics_value_or_suppres.value: (value IS NOT NULL AND suppressed = false) OR (value IS NULL AND suppressed = true)

partner_agreements_date_order.name: partner_agreements_date_order
partner_agreements_date_order.value: effective_date IS NULL OR end_date IS NULL OR effective_date <= end_date
